name: Check Zitadel State Consistency
description: Pre-compose drift check between postgres zitadel DB and the bootstrap volume PATs. Fails fast if events exist but login-client.pat is missing (zitadel-api would skip FirstInstance and zitadel-login would hang forever) or if PATs exist without a DB.

parameters.name: VM ID
parameters.description: VMID of the new zitadel container.
